sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BitMine Immersion Shares Paris Blockchain Week Investor Presentation
feed.summary: BitMine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) publicly shared its Paris Blockchain Week investor presentation given by Executive Chairman Tom Lee on April 15, 2026. The company furnished these materials, limiting their securities-law liabilities. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates BMNR as Neutral, citing strong balance sheet and rapid revenue growth but concerns over negative cash flow and profit sustainability.

feed.title: MetLife Supports Climate Innovation Through the Strauch Cleantech to Market Program, Advancing Sustainable Solutions
feed.summary: MetLife has completed its fourth year supporting The Strauch Cleantech to Market Program (C2M), awarding "MetLife Climate Solutions Awards" at the 2025 Climate Tech Summit. The program, which includes 40 MetLife employee volunteers, fosters impactful climate technologies by students. These awards recognize startups demonstrating compelling solutions for strengthening resilience and well-being.

feed.title: Deere’s air cart targets efficiency for small grains growers
feed.summary: John Deere has launched the C1100T air cart, designed to enhance efficiency for small grains producers by allowing more acres to be covered between refills during narrow seeding windows. The new model integrates existing C-Series features like AccuRate meters and the EZCal system, alongside new additions such as EZLift for bulk bags and a larger flex tank. These innovations, combined with John Deere Operations Center compatibility, aim to reduce downtime and improve application accuracy and logistics for growers.

feed.title: U.S. home prices barely moved in March, but big cities split apart
feed.summary: A new report from Homes.com, a CoStar Group brand, indicates that national median home prices in the U.S. rose modestly by 1.3% year-over-year to $385,000 in March 2026, marking a continued trend of restrained growth towards market rebalancing. While national stability was observed, significant divergence in price growth occurred across major metropolitan areas; Northeast and Midwest cities saw moderate gains, whereas some markets in California and Texas experienced declines. This reflects varying local affordability, supply conditions, and prior price run-ups shaping the spring homebuying season.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Medtronic Price Target to $93 From $92, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Baird has adjusted its price target for Medtronic (MDT) to $93, an increase from its previous target of $92, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects an analyst's revised outlook on the medical equipment manufacturer's valuation. The news comes amid several other analyst adjustments for Medtronic.

feed.title: News | RTX's Raytheon completes first flight test for RAIVEN® sensing system
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has successfully completed the first flight test of its RAIVEN® Staring system on a UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter. The air-cooled sensor suite demonstrated superior situational awareness by accurately mapping diverse landscapes in zero illumination with 270-degree coverage. This next-generation electro-optical and infrared solution is platform-agnostic, scalable, and designed to improve survivability and mission effectiveness through advanced sensing capabilities and a spherical 360-degree field of view.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts Price Target on Fair Isaac to $1,700 From $2,200, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has adjusted its price target for Fair Isaac (FICO) shares, lowering it to $1,700 from the previous $2,200. Despite this reduction, the firm has chosen to maintain its "Outperform" rating on the stock. This update reflects the analyst's revised valuation while still indicating a positive outlook on the company's performance.

feed.title: Roth Capital Adjusts EOG Resources Price Target to $134 From $110, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Roth Capital has increased its price target for EOG Resources to $134 from $110, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation for the oil and gas exploration and production company. The article also provides a brief company profile for EOG Resources, detailing its sales breakdown and geographical distribution.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Deckers Outdoor to $115 From $110, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has revised its price target for Deckers Outdoor (DECK) upwards to $115 from the previous $110. The firm is maintaining its Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook by the analyst firm on the company's valuation.

feed.title: KeyCorp Lowers Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) Price Target to $200.00
feed.summary: KeyCorp reduced its price target for Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) from $235.00 to $200.00 but maintained an "overweight" rating. Despite beating quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, Snowflake faces negative margins, substantial insider selling, and legal concerns from class-action notices and reports of customer data breaches linked to its platform. The company currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $245.97.

feed.title: KeyCorp Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Rubrik (NYSE:RBRK) Stock Price
feed.summary: KeyCorp has reduced its price target for Rubrik (NYSE:RBRK) from $80 to $70, while still maintaining an "overweight" rating, indicating a potential upside of 45.7%. Despite this target trim, the analyst consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $88.60. Rubrik exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates but provided mixed guidance for Q1 and FY 2027, and has seen notable insider selling.

feed.title: From Reese’s PB&J cups to Jolt root beer, nostalgia is driving CPG’s latest launches
feed.summary: CPG brands are leveraging consumer nostalgia with new product launches that tap into retro flavors, classic designs, and childhood memories. Examples include Reese's new PB&J and Marshmallow cups, the reintroduction of Jolt Root Beer by Redcon1, and McKee Foods making its Chocolate Old Fashioned Donuts a permanent offering. Smucker's is also updating its fruit spread labels with a nod to its classic gingham pattern.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Evergy to $84 From $82, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Evergy (EVRG) to $84 from $82, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other analysts like BTIG Research, Barclays, BMO Capital, Wells Fargo, and Citigroup have also recently updated their price targets and ratings for the utility company. Evergy specializes in electricity distribution in Kansas and Missouri, with a production capacity of 15,812 MW at the end of 2025.

feed.title: Wall Street Is 93% Above Where Celsius Holdings Stock Trades: Here’s Why
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings (CELH) is trading near its 52-week low despite record FY25 revenues, with Wall Street analysts giving it a mean target 93% above its current price. The perceived undervaluation stems from a timing anomaly in Q4 revenue reporting for the CELSIUS brand, which obscured underlying growth, and strong integration progress of Alani Nu and Rockstar Energy into the PepsiCo distribution system. The article suggests that upcoming Q1 FY26 earnings will be a crucial inflection point to validate the company's growth trajectory and analyst confidence.

feed.title: AIDS Healthcare Foundation calls out Gilead Sciences over the high cost of HIV medications in Florida
feed.summary: The AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) is publicly criticizing Gilead Sciences for the high cost of its HIV medications, stating that these prices are straining Florida's AIDS Drug Assistance Program (ADAP). The AHF claims that drugs like Biktarvy, costing over $4,000 a month, led to its removal from the state's ADAP formulary, jeopardizing patient access. While Gilead Sciences asserts it offers significant discounts and won't increase prices through 2026, advocates like Tracy Jones warn that without long-term funding solutions, thousands of Floridians could face uncertain access to HIV care.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies to release Q1 results April 29, hold call April 30
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) announced it will discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results during a conference call and webcast on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The press release containing the results will be issued after market close on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The call will be hosted by CEO H. Lynn Moore Jr. and CFO Brian K. Miller, and registration details are provided for participants.

feed.title: CSGP Maintained by BTIG -- Price Target Lowered to $55.00
feed.summary: BTIG analyst Jake Fuller has maintained a Buy rating on CoStar Group (CSGP) but lowered the price target from $60.00 to $55.00. Despite the reduced target, the company is considered significantly undervalued by GuruFocus, with a GF Value™ of $98.83 against a current price of $37.60, and shows strong insider buying activity. The stock's GF Score™ of 78/100 indicates robust financial health, profitability, and growth potential, though its high P/E ratio and lower valuation and momentum ranks warrant investor caution.

feed.title: Assessing Coeur Mining (CDE) Valuation After Debt Exchange Progress And 2025 Responsibility Report
feed.summary: Coeur Mining (CDE) is gaining investor attention following a successful senior notes exchange and the release of its 2025 Responsibility Report. The stock has seen significant momentum with a 2.5x 1-year total shareholder return. While some narratives suggest the stock is slightly undervalued with a fair value of $21.60, its current P/E of 37.4x is considerably higher than industry averages, indicating potential valuation risk.

feed.title: DTE Energy’s data center expansion draws Michigan backlash
feed.summary: DTE Energy is facing significant public backlash in Michigan due to its involvement in data center expansion projects and its political spending. This opposition has led to proposed legislation, including a potential moratorium on new data center approvals and the repeal of tax incentives, which could impact DTE's growth trajectory and financial picture, introducing new risks for investors. Despite strong past performance, the ongoing community pushback and legislative actions signal a meaningful shift that investors need to monitor closely.

feed.title: Tennessee water plant marks 25 years of national quality recognition
feed.summary: Tennessee American Water announced the availability of its 2025 Water Quality Reports, confirming that it continues to meet or exceed all state and federal water quality standards. The Citico Water Treatment Plant received the Partnership for Safe Water Director's Award for the 25th consecutive year, recognizing its consistent excellence in optimizing treatment processes. This achievement highlights the utility's commitment to providing high-quality drinking water to approximately 425,000 people in Tennessee and north Georgia.

feed.title: PNC Bank Debuts Consumer Loyalty and Rewards Program
feed.summary: PNC Bank has launched PNC TotalRewards, a new relationship-based loyalty program designed to offer tiered benefits that grow with the client relationship. The program provides clients with value, transparency, and ways to enhance their financial well-being, including fee avoidance, credit card rewards, and elevated savings rates based on account balances. Notably, military members automatically qualify for the Silver Tier, and enrollment is free with automatic tier advancement as relationships with PNC grow.

feed.title: Microsoft to Introduce OpenClaw Alternative
feed.summary: Microsoft is reportedly testing OpenClaw-like features for its Microsoft 365 Copilot service, targeting corporate clients with enhanced security. This new development, which may or may not function locally, complements their existing AI offerings like Cowork and Copilot Tasks. The new product is expected to be officially unveiled at the Microsoft Build conference in June.

feed.title: Byrna Technologies promotes Matthew Campagni to strategy chief
feed.summary: Byrna Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ:BYRN) has promoted Matthew Campagni to Chief Strategy Officer, where he will lead strategic planning and cross-functional execution for the personal defense technology company. Campagni brings over 25 years of executive leadership experience in strategy, operations, finance, and program management. The promotion comes as Byrna Technologies navigates challenging market conditions and recently reported Q1 2026 earnings that fell short of expectations.

feed.title: How Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. (BOW) Affects Rotational Strategy Timing
feed.summary: This article analyzes Bowhead Specialty Holdings Inc. (BOW) using AI models to determine its effect on rotational strategy timing. It highlights strong near- and mid-term sentiment but a weak long-term outlook, identifying elevated downside risk. The analysis provides specific institutional trading strategies for different risk profiles, including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, with detailed entry, target, and stop-loss levels.

feed.title: BPAY Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of BlackRock Future Financial and Technology ETF (BPAY), detailing its stock price, performance, and financial data. As of April 14, 2026, BPAY stock traded at $24.03, showing a 2.16% increase. Key metrics include a 2.2% gain over the past year and low short interest, suggesting limited bearish sentiment.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Sells 16,507 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. reduced its stake in Cisco Systems by 1.9% in the fourth quarter, selling 16,507 shares and now holding 861,733 shares valued at $66.38 million. Despite this sale, analysts remain largely positive on Cisco, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $89.76, following strong quarterly earnings that beat estimates and a dividend increase. The article also highlights insider selling activity and mixed market sentiments regarding Cisco's valuation and strategic moves like the Splunk acquisition.

feed.title: CASI Pharmaceuticals (CASI) begins OTCQB trading of ordinary shares as CASIF
feed.summary: CASI Pharmaceuticals announced that its ordinary shares have commenced trading on the OTCQB market under the ticker symbol CASIF as of April 14, 2026. This move was disclosed in a Form 6-K filing, integrating the information into the company's existing shelf registration statements. CASI Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing CID-103, an anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody for organ transplant rejection and autoimmune diseases.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Makes New $29.84 Million Investment in Omnicom Group Inc. $OMC
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. has made a new $29.84 million investment in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC), acquiring 369,492 shares in the fourth quarter. Omnicom's board has authorized a $5.00 billion share buyback program, and the company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.80, though it has a high payout ratio. Analyst ratings are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and a target price of $95.86, while some analysts have issued "Buy" ratings with higher price targets.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Sells 2,997 Shares of Northrop Grumman Corporation $NOC
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. reduced its stake in Northrop Grumman Corporation by 3% in Q4, selling 2,997 shares, but the company remains its 17th largest holding. Despite this, positive program momentum for the B-21 Raider and Sentinel ICBM suggests stronger long-term revenue. However, insider selling and potential cost pressures on margins present risks for the aerospace giant.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Boosts Stock Position in Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. $APD
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. increased its stake in Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE:APD) by 5.8% in Q4, now owning 64,334 shares valued at $15.892 million. The company reported strong Q4 results, beating EPS expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.81. While institutional ownership is high, one insider sold a significant number of shares in February.

feed.title: American Express Company $AXP Shares Sold by ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. has reduced its stake in American Express Company (AXP) by 4.8%, selling 7,892 shares, though AXP remains its 16th largest holding. This comes as insider selling also occurred, with 73,944 shares sold in the last 90 days. Despite this, American Express recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.95 and provided FY2026 EPS guidance, while institutional investors like Fisher Asset Management and Capital World Investors increased their holdings.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Buys 9,786 Shares of AMETEK, Inc. $AME
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. increased its holdings in AMETEK, Inc. by 8.9% in the fourth quarter, purchasing 9,786 additional shares and now owning a total of 119,801 shares valued at approximately $24.6 million. This increase occurred as AMETEK reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend. Institutional investors hold a significant 87.43% stake in the technology company.

feed.title: Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW Shares Sold by ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Lowe's Companies, selling 51.8% of its shares. Despite this, institutional investors collectively own 74.06% of Lowe's, with several major firms increasing their holdings. Lowe's exceeded Q4 earnings and revenue estimates and announced a $1.20 quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $289.24.

feed.title: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. $IFF Shares Sold by ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. reduced its stake in International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. ($IFF) by 13.4% in the fourth quarter, selling 44,915 shares. Despite this, several other institutional investors increased their holdings. IFF's recent quarterly earnings missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations, with the company also announcing a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Acquires 9,929 Shares of Yum! Brands, Inc. $YUM
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. increased its stake in Yum! Brands by 5.6%, acquiring an additional 9,929 shares and bringing its total holdings to 187,593 shares valued at approximately $28.38 million. Meanwhile, company insiders sold 14,138 shares worth about $2.29 million, including substantial sales by CEO Christopher Lee Turner and Aaron Powell. Yum! Brands also announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.75 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $3.00 and a 1.9% yield.

feed.title: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. Makes New $2.55 Million Investment in Generac Holdings Inc. $GNRC
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. has made a new $2.55 million investment in Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC), purchasing 18,728 shares in the fourth quarter. This comes despite Generac missing its recent quarterly earnings estimates and a significant insider sale by CFO York A. Ragen. Analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Generac with an average target price of $229.94.

feed.title: Equifax, Inc. $EFX Shares Sold by ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc.
feed.summary: ZWJ Investment Counsel Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Equifax (NYSE: EFX) by 83.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 148,111 shares and retaining 30,092 shares valued at approximately $6.53 million. Despite this, other institutional investors increased their positions, and 96.2% of the stock is held by institutional investors and hedge funds. Equifax reported strong Q4 earnings, beating expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend while also providing optimistic FY 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Qualcomm Schedules Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) announced it will release its second-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after market close. The results will be available on the company's Investor Relations website and filed with the SEC. Qualcomm will also host a live conference call on the same day at 1:45 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss the results, with an audio replay available for 30 days.

feed.title: Lockheed’s Sikorsky unveils armed Black Hawk kits to expand roles (LMT:NYSE)
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin's Sikorsky unit has introduced new armed configuration kits for its Black Hawk helicopter, enabling the aircraft to adapt to a wider array of missions without needing specialized fleets. These modular kits are expected to enhance upgrades, sustainment, and foreign military sales, providing Lockheed with strategic benefits like boosted sales, reduced lifecycle costs for operators, and positioning the company for additional revenue throughout the Black Hawk's extended service life. The move addresses military demand for flexible and cost-efficient platforms.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz elevates Mac & Cheese with new line
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz has launched a new line of Mac & Cheese called "Restaurant Edition," aiming to bring restaurant-style flavors to at-home consumers. The line introduces three new varieties: Parmesan pesto, Romano cacio e pepe, and Monterey Jack caramelized onion, each offering 10 grams of protein per serving. These new products will be available nationwide this month at a suggested retail price of $3.49 per box.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Extra Space Storage to $148 From $150, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has adjusted its price target for Extra Space Storage (NYSE: EXR) to $148 from $150, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This modification was reported on April 15, 2026, at 08:54 am EDT. The article also provides a summary of recent analyst adjustments for Extra Space Storage.

feed.title: Leadership shift at Kenvue (NYSE: KVUE) as Howlett becomes interim CFO
feed.summary: Kenvue (NYSE: KVUE) announced a leadership change in its finance department, with current CFO Amit Banati stepping down on May 12, 2026. Heather Howlett, currently Chief Accounting Officer, will assume the roles of interim Chief Financial Officer and Chief Accounting Officer. Howlett will receive a monthly stipend of $125,000 in addition to her existing compensation package, which includes a base salary of $544,116, a target bonus of $299,264, and an annual equity award of $420,000 for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: G.I. Joe, Power Rangers, "Jem" & More Set for Hasbro Legends Channel
feed.summary: Hasbro Entertainment and Get After It Media (GAIM) are launching "Hasbro Legends," a new linear channel dedicated to Hasbro's popular IPs like G.I. Joe, Power Rangers, and Transformers. The channel will be available across GAIM's network, reaching over 70 million US homes via over-the-air broadcast and free ad-supported streaming television (FAST). This partnership aims to connect with existing fans and introduce new audiences to Hasbro's classic franchises.

feed.title: Webull Unlocks Active Trading for All, Eliminating the Pattern Day Trade $25K Minimum Balance and Trade Count Restrictions
feed.summary: Webull announced its immediate support for the removal of Pattern Day Trader (PDT) rules, allowing investors to place unlimited day trades without the previous $25,000 minimum balance requirement. This change will enable Webull users to redeploy capital more quickly, respond to market opportunities, and access expanded flexibility for active investing in stocks, ETFs, and options. Webull aims to be among the first retail brokerages to implement the updated intraday trading framework once regulatory approval is finalized.

feed.title: Webull Says New Rules Will Let Users Day Trade Without $25,000 Minimum
feed.summary: Webull announced its support for upcoming intraday margining rules that will eliminate Pattern Day Trader (PDT) restrictions, removing the $25,000 minimum balance and the three-day-trade limit within five business days. This change will allow Webull users to execute unlimited day trades in stocks, ETFs, and options, with realized profits immediately boosting intraday buying power. The activation is contingent on final regulatory approval and implementation timelines from U.S. regulators.

feed.title: Cogent posts Q1 results May 4, then takes investor questions
feed.summary: Cogent Communications (NASDAQ: CCOI) is scheduled to host its First Quarter 2026 earnings conference call on May 4, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. A press release detailing the operating results will be issued earlier the same day at 7:00 a.m. ET. The call will allow the company to present its financial performance and answer questions from participants, with access available via dial-in numbers and an audio webcast.

feed.title: Clarivate to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
feed.summary: Clarivate announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 29, 2026. This press release specifically highlights the upcoming earnings report. The article also lists several other past and future earnings announcement dates for Clarivate.

feed.title: New Adobe Premiere Color Grading Mode Accelerated on NVIDIA GPUs
feed.summary: Adobe is introducing a new Color Mode in beta for Premiere Pro, designed as a dedicated, GPU-accelerated grading environment. This mode, optimized for NVIDIA GeForce RTX and NVIDIA RTX PRO systems, offers a streamlined workflow with 32-bit color depth for faster performance and quality. Additionally, NVIDIA has updated Project G-Assist, an experimental AI assistant, with improved recommendations and controls for system optimization and advanced RTX features.

feed.title: Canaan adds 10 MW in North America, grows bitcoin holdings to 1,808
feed.summary: Canaan Inc. has reported its March 2026 bitcoin mining updates, announcing an increase of over 10 MW in its North American power capacity and growing its cryptocurrency treasury to a record 1,808 BTC and 3,952 ETH. The company also highlighted its average all-in power cost of $0.044/kWh and an average miner efficiency of 18.7 J/TH in North America. Additionally, Canaan's CEO and CFO increased their shareholdings through open market purchases, reflecting confidence in the company's long-term strategy.

feed.title: How Biomarker Testing Helped a Lung Cancer Patient Get the Treatment She Needed
feed.summary: This article highlights the story of Kelly Huffman, a Pfizer employee and former nurse, who was diagnosed with stage IV non-small cell lung cancer. Despite initial misdiagnoses, biomarker testing revealed her cancer was ALK-positive, which significantly guided her treatment. Her experience underscores the importance of patient advocacy, seeking second opinions, and the critical role of information in healthcare.
